name: memorised-them-all
description: Convert any attachment to Markdown and digest it into a token-free knowledge-graph memory — locally, deterministically, no AI models needed.
long_description:
Memorised them All turns a folder of documents into durable, **token-free** memory for Claude, entirely on your machine. It converts every attachment (PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, HTML, EPub, CSV, and more) to Markdown locally using Microsoft's MarkItDown plus optional Tesseract OCR, recursively unpacks archives (zip/tar/gz, and rar/7z when an extractor is installed) with bomb- and path-traversal guards, and skips media/font/junk files cleanly. It then runs a fully **deterministic, model-free** pipeline — rule-based extraction of entities/relations/facts, fuzzy entity resolution, community detection, and layered summaries — to build a knowledge graph: a global synopsis, per-theme summaries, per-document Markdown notes, and an exportable memory bundle. No Ollama, no LLM, no embedding model, no GPU, no network: the same corpus always produces the same memory, and a digest always completes on any machine (per-file timeouts, crash-safe atomic writes). Every tool returns only compact metadata or a tiny relevant slice, never document contents, so digesting and recalling whole folders costs ~0 Claude context tokens.

It also converts legacy Bengali (Bijoy/SutonnyMJ ANSI fonts) to standard Unicode automatically (font-aware, so mixed English+Bengali documents convert cleanly).

Tools: digest, convert, recall, memory_overview, export_memory, list_digestible, forget, memory_status.

tools.name: digest
tools.description: Convert + digest files/dirs/globs into local graph memory (archives unpacked, media skipped, duplicates deduped). Returns metadata only (token-free).

tools.name: convert
tools.description: Convert files/dirs/globs to Markdown locally (legacy Bengali/SutonnyMJ→Unicode); writes .md files. Token-free.

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Return a small, citable slice of memory for a query. Never returns whole documents.

tools.name: memory_overview
tools.description: Synopsis, stats and theme list for a project's memory.

tools.name: export_memory
tools.description: Export memory.md, per-document notes and graph.json to a folder.

tools.name: list_digestible
tools.description: List convertible files under a directory (paths/sizes only).

tools.name: forget
tools.description: Delete a project's memory (graph, converted Markdown, vectors). Irreversible.

tools.name: memory_status
tools.description: Local setup health: deterministic engine, Tesseract, MarkItDown version, projects.

ocr_lang.title: OCR language(s)
ocr_lang.description: Tesseract language codes for scanned documents, e.g. 'eng', 'eng+ben'. Missing packs are dropped gracefully. (Images are skipped by default; set MTA_SKIP_MEDIA=off to OCR them.)

workers.title: Parallel workers (0 = auto)
workers.description: Conversion workers; 0 auto-sizes to performance cores and RAM.
